title: Design System: ZamZam Auto Parts — Web Inventory

headline.purpose: Modal and page titles only — the largest text in the app, capped at 18px.

title.purpose: Card titles and detail-view section headings.

body.purpose: Running text, inputs, base document size.

label.purpose: Badges, meta rows, filter chips, vehicle-line eyebrows.

shadows.name: sm
shadows.purpose: Barely-there separation for small floating controls (card 3-dot menu trigger).

shadows.name: md
shadows.purpose: Hover-lifted cards, open menus/dropdowns, the floating tab island.

motion.name: ease-card-hover
motion.value: transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease

motion.name: ease-tab
motion.purpose: Segmented-control tab and menu-item state changes.

breakpoints.name: grid-2up
breakpoints.purpose: Below this, card grids stay 2-per-row; above it, auto-fill takes over.

breakpoints.name: modal-dialog
breakpoints.purpose: Below this, detail modals are bottom sheets; above it, centered dialogs.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1d3a5f; color: #fff; padding: 11px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #14293f; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1d3a5f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Delete action inside detail modals and confirm dialogs.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-danger"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 6h18M8 6V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2m3 0-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L4 6"/></svg> Delete</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: rgba(220,38,38,0.1); color: #dc2626; border: 1px solid #dc2626; padding: 7px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Part Card
components.description: Compact inventory item card with thumbnail, status badge, and meta row.
components.html:
Maruti Suzuki · K12

Front Right Headlamp

#OEM-4471
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e3e3e8; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 16px -4px rgba(15,15,20,0.12), 0 2px 6px -2px rgba(15,15,20,0.08); border-color: rgba(29,58,95,0.35); } .ds-card-thumb { aspect-ratio: 4/3; background: #f0f0f3; } .ds-card-body { padding: 12px 14px 14px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #1d3a5f; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; margin: 0; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0; } .ds-card-meta { font-size: 12px; color: #66666f; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill status/condition tag used on cards and detail views.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-badge-success { color: #16a34a; background: rgba(22,163,74,0.1); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Search bar with leading icon, used above every card grid.
components.css: .ds-search { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-search-icon { position: absolute; left: 13px; color: #93939c; } .ds-search-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 34px 10px 36px; border: 1px solid #e3e3e8; border-radius: 14px; background: #fff; font-size: 14px; } .ds-search-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(29,58,95,0.35); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(29,58,95,0.1); }

components.name: Segmented Tabs
components.description: Floating Cars/Parts pill switch on the Inventory page.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: inline-flex; gap: 2px; padding: 4px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e3e3e8; border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: 0 6px 16px -4px rgba(15,15,20,0.12), 0 2px 6px -2px rgba(15,15,20,0.08); } .ds-tab { padding: 9px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: #66666f; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; transition: background 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease; } .ds-tab-active { background: #1d3a5f; color: #fff; }

narrative.overview: This is the tool a yard clerk trusts to be right, not the tool that tries to impress them. Every screen reads like a well-kept ledger for a working scrapyard: precise records of parts and donor vehicles, dense but never cluttered, calm enough to use standing at a counter and specific enough to trust at a desk. Personality is clean, modern, and trustworthy — restraint and clarity carry the design, not decoration. The system explicitly rejects the generic SaaS-dashboard look: no purple-gradient hero cards, no stock-icon card grids, no boilerplate admin-template chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Flat surfaces at rest; depth appears only as feedback (hover, focus, overlay), never as ambient decoration.
One accent color, used sparingly, for anything interactive or 'the primary action.'
Dense information laid out with generous internal padding, not visual noise.
Identical component vocabulary whether the screen is used one-handed on a phone at the yard or with a mouse at a desk.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Ledger Navy is the only color used to mean 'interactive' or 'primary.' It never appears as pure decoration.

rules.name: The No-Display-Size Rule
rules.body: Nothing in this system exceeds 18px. Hierarchy comes from weight and color, not scale jumps.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A card, input, or panel with no active interaction has no shadow — only a 1px hairline border.

dos: Do use Ledger Navy (#1d3a5f / dark #3a6ea5) as the only accent — buttons, active states, focus rings, links.
Do keep cards and inputs flat (border only) at rest; add shadow-md only on hover/open/active states.
Do pair every signal color (danger/success/warning/info) with its one fixed meaning — never repurpose one for decoration.
Do keep type hierarchy to weight and color, capping size at 18px since this is a dense utility tool.
Do make every interactive control work identically at phone-in-hand and desk-with-mouse sizes.
donts: Don't reintroduce a generic SaaS-dashboard look: no purple/blue gradient hero cards, no stock-icon card grids.
Don't add a colored border-left/border-right stripe as a decorative accent on any card or list row.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient headings.
Don't let a card or button carry both a soft wide drop shadow and a full 1px border as static decoration.
Don't use border-radius above 20px on cards, panels, or inputs.
Don't repurpose Danger red, Success green, Warning amber, or Info blue as a general accent color.
